title: Introduction
description: NOC 64313 – Ground and water transport ticket agents, cargo service representatives and related clerks | GTR Immigration Ground and water transport ticket agents (NOC 64313) are essential to Canada's inter-city transit and logistics networks. Whether managing rail reservations for VIA Rail, ferry bookings for BC Ferries, or cargo shipments for national trucking lines, these TEER 4 professionals keep Canada moving. At GTR Immigration, we help cargo and transport clerks leverage their logistical experience to secure Permanent Residency through regional and provincial pathways.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category6 – Sales and service occupationsTEER Level4Major Group64 – Sales and service representativesSub-Major Group643 – Occupations in food, accommodation and tourismMinor Group6431 – Occupations in travel and accommodationNOC Code64313

labour_market_demand: The demand is Good, particularly in coastal provinces (BC and the Maritimes) for water transport and in central hubs for rail and bus transit. The rise of e-commerce has significantly boosted the demand for Cargo Service Representatives to manage the documentation of goods.
pathways: Atlantic Immigration Program (AIP): A high-conversion pathway for water transport agents in the Atlantic region.
Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot (RNIP): Addressing transit needs in participating communities.
